title: Another Year Looks Good on You [Happy Birthday Song]

style.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (143 BPM) G minor groove driven by a syncopated drum kit and warm synth pads that underpin smooth R&B vocal runs, creating an upbeat yet intimate atmosphere perfect for a birthday toast.
